stable_facts: Patrick Collison is the CEO and co-founder of Stripe
John Collison is the co-founder and President of Stripe
Stripe is a private company with no publicly traded stock
Stripe provides payment processing infrastructure for businesses
expected_patterns: mentions Stripe as a private company
mentions Stripe valuation from most recent funding or secondary transaction
mentions payments or financial infrastructure as core business
mentions IPO speculation or readiness as a topic
mentions competition from Adyen PayPal Braintree or similar
forbidden_content: Stripe trades on NYSE or NASDAQ
Stripe filed an S-1 or completed an IPO
notes: Primary test for private company handling. No stock price chart or market cap should appear. Accountant should gracefully report no public data. Normalizer must not fabricate a ticker symbol.
